  • Uses of Task in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.model.project with parameters of type Task
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Blackboard.addTask(Task task)
    Adds a task to this blackboard and keeps the bidirectional link consistent.
    void
    Blackboard.removeTask(Task task)
    Removes a task from this blackboard and clears its back-reference.

  • Uses of Task in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.project

    Methods in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.project that return Task
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Task
    TaskService.assignGoal(Long taskId, Long goalId, PUser user)
    Assigns the task to one of its own project's goals, so it contributes to that goal's progress.
    Task
    TaskService.assignTask(Long taskId, Long actorId, PUser user)
    Assigns a task to an actor (person or machine).
    Task
    TaskService.changeStatus(Long taskId, TaskStatus newStatus, PUser user)
    Changes a task's status.
    Task
    TaskService.createScheduledTask(Project project, String name, String description, int priority)
    Creates a task from a recurring schedule's template on project's blackboard with status TaskStatus.CREATED.
    Task
    TaskService.createTask(Long projectId, TaskService.TaskData data, PUser user)
    Creates a task on the given project's blackboard with status TaskStatus.CREATED.
    Task
    TaskService.getTask(Long taskId, PUser user)
     
    Task
    TaskService.startTracking(Long taskId, PUser user)
    Starts time tracking on a task: opens a new TimeSpan.TimeSpanType.TIME_TRACKER span with the current server time and promotes the task to TaskStatus.STARTED.
    Task
    TaskService.stopTracking(Long taskId, PUser user)
    Stops time tracking on a task: closes the running span with the current server time, moves it into the task's
    invalid reference 
    timeSpent
    history and sets the task to TaskStatus.STOPPED.
    Task
    TaskService.toggleTracking(Long taskId, PUser user)
    Toggles time tracking on a task: stops it if running, otherwise starts it.
    Task
    TaskService.unassignGoal(Long taskId, PUser user)
     
    Task
    TaskService.unassignTask(Long taskId, PUser user)
     
    Task
    TaskService.updateTask(Long taskId, TaskService.TaskData data, PUser user)

    TaskService.getTasksForProject(Long projectId, PUser user)
